name: Zombie
description: Zombie is a hostile mob in Minecraft. Drops: rotten_flesh,iron,carrot,potato. Found in overworld dark. Burns in sunlight.

name: Zombie drops
description: Zombie drops: rotten_flesh,iron,carrot,potato. Looting enchantment increases drop rates.

name: Zombie spawns
description: Spawning conditions for Zombie: overworld dark. Spawns in darkness (light level 7 or less).

name: Fighting Zombie
description: Combat strategy vs Zombie: Use diamond armor, sword, and bow. Burns in sunlight. Strafe and use healing potions.
